nasb.text: ‘Cursed is he who distorts the justice due an alien, orphan, and widow.’ And all the people shall say, ‘Amen.’

esv.text: “‘Cursed be anyone who perverts the justice due to the sojourner, the fatherless, and the widow.’ And all the people shall say, ‘Amen.’

cnv.text: “‘對寄居的和孤兒寡婦屈枉正直的，必受咒詛。’眾民都要說：‘阿們。’

ccb.text: ‘不公正地对待寄居者和孤儿寡妇的必受咒诅！’ 全体民众要回答说，‘阿们！’
